code: const API_BASE="https://siefalfek1.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com";export async function fetchCars(){const res=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/cars"));if(!res.ok)throw new Error("Failed to fetch cars");return res.json();}export async function reserveTrack(data){const res=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE,"/reserve"),{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(data)});if(!res.ok)throw new Error("Reservation failed");return res.json();}
